notes: All 12 phase-3 tasks closed: hotskills-3o8 (3.1 migration framework), hotskills-dtw (3.7 skill ID parser), hotskills-0uo (3.2 config + state IO; closes rqw too), hotskills-rqw (HOTSKILLS_PROJECT_CWD validation, closed via 3.2), hotskills-65s (3.3 activation engine with manifest), hotskills-2qo (3.4 hotskills.activate tool), hotskills-rve (3.5 hotskills.invoke dispatcher), hotskills-p1b (3.6 list + deactivate), hotskills-m8r (search supports github sources), hotskills-mhc (env.ts homedir hardening), hotskills-gu7 (audit-log newline test), hotskills-zvm (checkGitVersion startup wire). srt deferred to phase-4 (gate-status preview depends on Task 4.6). T4 nurture closed (hotskills-r50): consolidated tools/_util.ts dedupe, added cross-component activate->list->invoke->deactivate integration test (3 cases), filed 2 follow-ups (w9g activation lock tightening -> phase-4; batch config writes in force_whitelist -> cleanup). T5 secure closed (hotskills-vwr): identified + fixed URL-injection in github source enumerator (SAFE_NAME validated at runtime AND in JSON schema for owner/repo/branch); reviewed remainder; filed 1 follow-up (0rk wire whitelist-activations.log -> phase-4). Test suite: 161 tests pass (was 69 at phase-3 start, +92 new). 16 atomic commits on brains/hotskills-mcp-server. Phase-3 exit criteria satisfied: hotskills.activate completes full flow (stub gate -> materialize -> manifest -> append to .hotskills/config.json) returning {skill_id, path, manifest}; hotskills.invoke returns {body, path, scripts, references, args_passed} with ${SKILL_PATH} substituted, errors for non-activated; hotskills.list reflects allow-list across project/global/merged scopes; hotskills.deactivate removes from project allow-list with cache_preserved_at. Note: agent-spawn tools (Agent / general-purpose subagent) were not available in this environment; T2 grooming and T3 implementation were performed inline by the teammate model. T4/T5 multi-LLM star-chamber unavailable for the same reason; review performed in --single equivalent mode.
